title: Iran escalation may push oil above $100
text: Geopolitical escalation increases probability of oil spike, inflation pressure, and risk-off positioning.

title: Prediction markets activity outperforming DeFi sectors
text: Prediction markets are one of the few crypto sectors showing positive activity growth while other DeFi categories decline.

title: Negative funding across risk assets
text: Short positioning is increasing while liquidity remains thin. Potential for reflexive squeeze if spot buyers appear.
